summary: iOS 🟥 HSFWCH-10257 | FALCON 🎧 Custom EQ settings are not saved
scenario: Custom EQ slider positions reset to default after saving and reopening EQ settings on Device Settings > Sound > Tune
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved. Steps: Pair device with app, go to Device Settings > Sound > Tune, select Custom, change sliders, tap Save EQ, then close and reopen EQ settings. Observed: Custom EQ is selected but all sliders reset to default (middle) position. Expected: Changes to custom EQ sliders should be properly saved.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the paired [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
5. Adjust one or more EQ sliders (e.g., Bass, Mid, Treble) to non-default positions.
6. Tap "Save EQ" to save the custom settings.
7. Close the Equalizer screen (tap back or navigate away).
8. Re-open the Equalizer screen via Audio Settings → Equalizer.
expected: The Custom EQ preset remains selected and all slider positions reflect the previously saved custom adjustments.
actual: Custom EQ is selected, but all sliders have reset to the default (center/middle) position, losing the saved custom adjustments.
